Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Simplify connection path in architecture diagram

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update architecture diagram via draw.io desktop editor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Implement distributed web crawler with 6 microservices

Java 21 / Spring Boot 3.2 / Kafka-based pipeline:
- Seed URL Controller: REST API for submitting crawl seeds
- URL Frontier: politeness-enforced, disk-backed URL queue
- HTML Downloader (x3): virtual thread downloads with robots.txt
- Link Extractor (x2): Jsoup-based link parsing
- URL Filter: extension/domain/depth filtering
- URL Seen: Bloom filter + PostgreSQL deduplication

Includes Docker Compose (14 containers), Prometheus/Grafana
monitoring, unit tests, README, and draw.io architecture diagram.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Cicada, Expressway, Gavel writeups; rewrite DarkZero from actual walkthrough

- Added htb-expressway.md (easy/Linux — IKE PSK crack, CVE-2025-32463)
- Added htb-gavel.md (medium/Linux — git-dumper, SQLi, PHP rule engine RCE, SUID bash)
- Copied all writeup images to public/images/writeups/{cicada,expressway,gavel}/

commit.message:
opus-2026-03-06-S26: n=5 tiling skeleton and spectral analysis

- tiling_skeleton_n5.py: 64 tilings, 12 iso classes, delta_H always even
  delta_H ranges -6 to +12; Class 3(H=3)->Class 9(H=15) single flip
  4 self-flip pairs in classes 8(H=11) and 10(H=13)

- skeleton_spectral_n5.py: Transfer matrix spectral analysis per class
  M=(H/n)*I=3*I for classes 9 and 11 (both H=15)
  Off-diagonal sum = 0 for ALL classes (odd n Sigma identity)
  Self-flip pairs have identical eigenvalue spectra

- Use jq for version parsing, drop set -e in favor of explicit error handling

commit.message:
Add Phileas integration for secret redaction in transcripts (#54)

Integrates the Phileas PII/secret redaction library to filter sensitive
information from transcript events before they are logged. This helps
prevent accidental exposure of secrets, credentials, and PII.

Changes:
- Add Phileas 3.1.0 dependency
- Create PhileasFilteringService that configures Phileas to redact:
  - Credit cards, SSNs, emails, phone numbers
  - IP addresses, MAC addresses, URLs
  - AWS keys, GitHub tokens, database connection strings
  - Password arguments, bearer tokens, private key headers
- Add enableSecretFiltering setting (defaults to true)
- Integrate filtering into ActivityTranscriptService.log()
- Add comprehensive tests for filtering functionality

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NrAqdjdTz9ehYPogrGojt8

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace direct fetch scraper with Jina Reader API proxy

Direct fetch from Vercel serverless gets blocked by most sites' bot
protection. Jina Reader (r.jina.ai) proxies the request through a
real browser and returns clean markdown. No API key needed. GitHub
scraping still uses the GitHub API directly. Removed cheerio dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Mood system: traits, moodlets, speed mult, save v90, test scenario

Foundation: mood.h/mood.c with continuous inputs (hunger/thirst/energy/temp),
discrete moodlets from events, 5 personality traits with multiplier table,
and mood-driven work speed (0.7x miserable to 1.2x happy).

Phase 1: MoodTick wired into game loop, GetMoodSpeedMult in RunWorkProgress,
AssignRandomTraits on mover spawn, moodEnabled=true, save v90 migration.

Phase 2: Moodlet triggers in needs.c for eating (good/raw food), sleeping
(ground/leaf pile/plank bed), drinking (tea-juice/dirty water), warming.

Extras: mood tooltip, inspector mood output, event log instrumentation,
click-to-place mover (N key in sandbox), MoodTest terrain scenario with
comfort camp vs rough camp to showcase personality differences.

44 tests, 97 assertions passing.

- Call purgeBuilding() in deleteBuilding() after cleaning localStorage

commit.message:
feat(archiver): add BLAKE3 checksums, genesis_hash validation, and restore command

- BLAKE3 checksum sidecar files (.blake3) written alongside each archived block
- genesis_hash included in manifest.json for chain identity verification
- `doli-node restore --from <dir> --yes` imports blocks with checksum + genesis_hash
  verification, then auto-runs recover to rebuild UTXO/producer/chain state
- Checksum mismatch or genesis_hash mismatch stops restore with clear error

commit.message:
security: enable Row Level Security on all public schema tables

Blocks direct PostgREST access via Supabase anon/authenticated roles.
FastAPI (connecting as postgres superuser via DATABASE_URL) bypasses
RLS automatically — no application changes required.

No permissive policies added; all data access must go through the
FastAPI REST API. Resolves Supabase security advisory for all 13 tables.

commit.message:
fix: only re-emit .js input files when outDir is set

TypeScript skips re-emitting .js input files when there's no outDir
(to avoid overwriting source files). This fixes 7 regressions from
the previous commit's .js file processing.

commit.message:
docs: sim results with class-varied HP — 8.8% win rate, monster rebalance needed

L1 balance is reasonable (Warrior 83%, Ranger 71%, Mage 22%).
L5+ monsters are massively overtuned — 0% win rates from L10 onward.
HP class differentiation works (2:1 Warrior:Mage ratio at L50).
Root cause: monster HP scales 1.6-3.0x player HP, player DPR too low.
Next step: monster HP rebalance + weapon damage scaling review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: wire model selection into invocation dispatch pipeline

Add model_hint, budget_tier, provider fields to invocations table and API.
Server merges request params > user prefs > org prefs at invocation creation
time, then passes resolved values as SEAM_MODEL_HINT/SEAM_BUDGET_TIER/
SEAM_PROVIDER env vars to workspaces. Agent CLI reads these as fallbacks
below CLI flags.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Speed up dashboard load: non-blocking fonts/icons, parallel API calls, SW caching

- Fonts (Google Fonts) and icons (Phosphor) now load async with media="print" trick
  instead of render-blocking <link> and @import
- Added preconnect hints for fonts.googleapis.com, fonts.gstatic.com, unpkg.com
- Parallelized init: loadRetreatMeta, loadServerTemplates, and loadAll now run
  concurrently instead of sequentially (saves ~2-4s on cold load)
- Service worker now caches external assets (fonts, icon CSS) with
  stale-while-revalidate strategy — instant on repeat visits
- Bumped SW cache version to v36

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: equipment change responsiveness — cache, live priority cards, soft invalid

1. Backend physics cache: in-memory cache keyed by (session_id, profile_id)
   with 30-min TTL. Switching A→B→A is instant on second A. Invalidated
   on equipment assignment change or profile edit.

2. Priority cards use live optimal data: PriorityCardsSection now accepts
   optimalComparison prop and prefers live time_cost_s over stale coaching
   report values when equipment changes.

3. Invalid reference shows data with warning: OptimalGapChart and
   CornerSpeedGapPanel now display per-corner data with an amber warning
   banner instead of hiding everything when is_valid=false. Only shows
   the "unavailable" message when no corner opportunities exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove four unused lab handler implementations and all associated
infrastructure: parsers, upload handlers, utility classes, the
HL7HandlerMSHMapping model/DAO, TDIS-specific DAO methods, and
LabType enum values.

- Delete 15 files (4 parsers, 4 upload handlers, 3 utilities,
  HL7HandlerMSHMapping model/DAO/DaoImpl, and test)
- Remove getEncounterId() and getRadiologistInfo() from
  MessageHandler interface and all 16 implementations
- Rename CreateLabelTDIS2Action to CreateLabLabel2Action with
  matching struts.xml, JSP form, and JavaScript updates
- Remove handler-specific rendering branches from LabPDFCreator,
  labDisplay.jsp, labDisplayAjax.jsp, and SegmentDisplay.jsp
- Clean up Spring bean definitions, component scan exclusions,
  message_config.xml entries, and test configurations
- Upgrade Factory.java handler resolution log levels from debug
  to warn/error for better operational visibility
- Fix stale ICL comment in AlphaHandler, incomplete tdisForm
  variable rename in JSPs, exception stack trace loss in
  CreateLabLabel2Action logger, and indentation left behind
  by removed wrapper blocks in LabPDFCreator

Closes #562

* fix: address NPE and index-safety issues flagged in PR review

- Add h.getOBXCount(i) > 0 guard before OBR comment export loop in
  DemographicExportAction42Action to prevent index-0 access when an
  OBR has no OBX segments; also replace .equals("") with .isEmpty()
- Replace currentLicenseNo.equals() with StringUtils.equals() in
  LabPDFCreator (lines 651, 793) to prevent NPE when getLabLicenseNo
  returns null for ExcellerisON reports
- Replace direct .isEmpty() calls on handler.getOBXReferenceRange/Units
  with StringUtils.isEmpty() in LabPDFCreator (line 683) for null safety
- Remove redundant obxCount > 0 inside the OBX for-loop in LabPDFCreator
  line 536 since obxCount is always > 0 within that loop

commit.message:
fix: add script to migrate base64 tour images to Cloudinary URLs

6 tours had base64-encoded images stored in DB instead of Cloudinary URLs,
causing missing images on the Next.js site (ISR strips base64 for caching).
Script uploads each base64 image to Cloudinary and updates the DB record.

Affected tours: explore-old-new-delhi-city-luxury-car-tour, hawa-mahal-private-tour,
james-bond-island-speedboat-tour-phuket, phi-phi-islands-speedboat-tour-maya-bay-snorkeling,
city-palace-guided-tour, lake-pichola-full-day-tour

Geometry template uses layer, wall close on start point click

- GeometryTemplate now exposes Layer (dropdown) and Level only;
  colour and lineweight are derived from the selected layer at
  placement time via _geom_color_lw()
- Added layer_ref property type to PropertyManager (dropdown
  populated from UserLayerManager, like level_ref for levels)
- Wire user_layer_manager into PropertyManager from main.py
- All geometry placement sites (line, rect, circle, arc, polyline)
  now use template.user_layer for layer and derive color/lw from it
- Wall close: clicking near the chain start point closes the wall
  loop and ends the chain
